title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards Betting Preview
text: The 2026 Golden Globe Awards will take place on Sunday, January 11, 2026, marking the kickoff of major awards season. Best Motion Picture (Musical/Comedy): One Battle After Another dominates at -2000 odds after winning at the Gotham Awards. The Paul Thomas Anderson film featuring Leonardo DiCaprio "holds a wildly impressive 94% on Rotten Tomatoes and 4.3/5 on Letterboxd." The odds heavily favor this title, though the line offers poor betting value. Best Motion Picture (Drama): The favorite is Hamnet at -115 odds, based on Maggie O'Farrell's novel about Shakespeare's wife grieving her son's death. The film has earned "an 87% rating on Rotten Tomatoes and 4.2/5 on Letterboxd." Director Chloé Zhao's work faces competition from Sinners (+125), though Hamnet is the clear pick. Best Podcast of the Year: This inaugural category features tight competition. Good Hang with Amy Poehler offers value at +300 odds. The podcast "has already reached No. 9 on Spotify" since launching in March and features celebrity guests including Tina Fey and Michelle Obama. BetUS offers these odds and provides a "225% welcome bonus of up to $3,625" for new customers interested in Golden Globes wagering.
